title: Rustins Raw Linseed Oil 300ml
features: A natural nourishing treatment for wood
description: From the manufacturer About Us In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture with £50. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London. Rustins LINS300 300ml Raw Linseed Oil A quick drying water based product which is an alternative to solvent based products. Conforms to The Articles in Contact with Food Regulations, Contains ultra violet light inhibitors to protect against sunlight.
